---
title: "FiberArray"
sidebar: references
---

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_references.py; edit specs/dasdae-inventory.yml instead. -->

Durable fiber-optic observing identity anchored by one or more optical paths.

Aliases: `FA`

## Attributes

| Name | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `code` | str | Station-like fiber array code used in data_source_id. |
| `name` | str | Human-readable fiber array name. |
| `start_time` | datetime64 | Start time for which this metadata item is valid. |
| `end_time` | datetime64 | End time for which this metadata item is valid. |
| `acquisitions` | tuple[[Acquisition](Acquisition.qmd), ...] | Acquisitions associated with this fiber array. |
| `optical_paths` | tuple[[OpticalPath](OpticalPath.qmd), ...] | Optical paths associated with this fiber array. |
| `notes` | str | Additional notes. |

## Contains

- [Acquisition](Acquisition.qmd)
- [OpticalPath](OpticalPath.qmd)

## Contained By

- [Network](Network.qmd)

## References

_None._

## Referenced By

_None._
